message:
✨ Fix marketplace to show all items from registry (#1215)

The marketplace page was only reading the 'items' array (3 dashboards)
from registry.json, but the registry also has a 'presets' array with
71 card-presets and 2 themes. This merges both arrays so all 76 items
are displayed.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
